◎简　　介  

　　A murderer on the run in the Kalahari (played by Gordon Vorster) meets the young widow Sarah (Trix Pienaar). He buys her farm and moves in. Gossip spreading through the small town eventually leads to them getting married. They discover innocence and good fortune until the long arm of the law find them.
